common.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the service. Check your connection.
common.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.title: Welcome to PepiProgress
home.body: Track how peptides actually affect you, and see real progress over time.

explore.title: Explore
explore.body: Your tracking, insights, and progress will live here.

goals.title: What are your goals?
goals.subtitle: Pick any that apply, they shape what you log.
goals.required: Pick at least one to continue

compounds.title: What are you taking?
compounds.subtitle: Select your compounds. This tailors your daily check-in.
compounds.note: Dose, route and frequency come next, coming soon.

cycle.title: Track your cycle?
cycle.subtitle: Optional. Flags normal water-retention weeks so you don't mistake them for lack of progress. You can change this anytime.

weight.title: Your starting weight
weight.subtitle: Optional. Sets your baseline for trend tracking.

health.title: Connect health data
health.subtitle: Auto-fill weight, sleep, and activity from your health tracker.

checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.subtitle: How are you today?
checkin.donePhotoPrompt: Keep your timeline honest with a consistent photo.

quicklog.title: Quick log
quicklog.label: In your words
quicklog.notConfigured: Quick-log AI isn't set up yet.
quicklog.voiceHint: Tip: tap the mic on your keyboard to speak instead of type.
quicklog.macroSeed: How much protein and calories did you have today?
quicklog.backgroundHint: Log it and go. We’ll distill it in the background.

photos.title: Progress photos
photos.permission: Camera access lets you take consistent progress photos, stored privately, just for you.
photos.ghostHint: Line yourself up with the faint guide.
photos.empty: No photos yet. Capture your first to start your timeline.
photos.clothingGuidance: For the most accurate results, wear as little as you're comfortable with. Underwear or nothing gives the algorithm a direct view of body composition changes.
photos.clothingHint: Less fabric = more accurate. Underwear or swimwear recommended.
photos.importLibrary: Import a photo from your library
photos.baselineSet: Baseline captured. First check-in scheduled for {{date}}.
photos.heading: Photos
photos.timelinePlaceholder: Your timeline builds as you capture
photos.analysisPlaceholder: AI analysis appears after your next comparison
photos.fitPoor: Very different from baseline. Consider retaking.
photos.qualityLowBody: Your score is lower than recommended. We recommend using less tight or baggy clothing for a better read. Remember, we don't use your photos to train our algorithm.
photos.bodyFatNeed: Add waist + neck for a body-fat estimate
photos.savedBaselineBody: Baseline set. Your next shot compares against this one.
photos.confWhyHigh: Lighting and framing match the baseline.
photos.confWhyMedium: Lighting or framing drifted from the baseline.
photos.confWhyLow: Too different from the baseline to compare closely.
photos.chooseCaptureTitle: How do you want to capture?
photos.captureGuidedDesc: Pick a pose and match your ghost overlay. Tracks your progress.
photos.captureQuickDesc: Shoot freely. It lands in your reel to sort later.

monitoring.description: Markers people commonly watch on this compound. Import a lab to fill them in.

symptoms.title: Symptoms & side effects
symptoms.photoSuggestion: This symptom may show visually. Scroll up to capture a progress photo.

protocol.title: Protocol
protocol.empty: No compounds yet. Add what you're taking below.
protocol.addFirstPrompt: Add your first compound to start tracking doses and inventory.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.empty: No items yet. Add a vial or consumable below.
inventory.label: Name

recon.title: Reconstitution calculator
recon.draw: Draw {{volume}} mL ({{units}} units on a U-100 syringe)
recon.enterValues: Enter vial, water and dose to calculate.

ageGate.label: AGE VERIFICATION
ageGate.title: Date of birth
ageGate.subtitle: You must be 18 or older to use PepiProgress.
ageGate.errorAge: You must be 18 or older to use this app.
ageGate.whyWeAsk: We require age verification to comply with app store and legal requirements. Your date of birth is stored only on your device.

storage.label: 1 OF 2, PHOTO STORAGE
storage.title: Store your progress photos
storage.body: Progress photos need to be stored so the ghost overlay and timeline can work. They are private by default, never shared unless you choose to.
storage.notice: Stored privately on your device and (when you create an account) in an encrypted private bucket, never shown to others, never used to train AI models.
storage.bullet1: Photos stay on your device by default.
storage.bullet3: Never used to train any AI model. Ever.

ai.label: 2 OF 2, AI ANALYSIS
ai.title: AI photo analysis
ai.body: Our AI compares consecutive photos for lighting, angle, and framing consistency, and gives a hedged, observational change note. It never diagnoses anything.
ai.notice: Photos are sent to a server-side AI service for analysis. Your photos are never used to train any model. Analysis is observational only, never a medical claim.

privacy.title: PRIVACY & DATA
privacy.exportBody: Download a copy of all your data as JSON, check-ins, doses, symptoms, protocols, and photo metadata.
privacy.deleteBody: Permanently delete all your local data. This cannot be undone. When you have an account, cloud data is also erased.
privacy.notMedicalAdvice: PepiProgress is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before making decisions about your health.
privacy.transitionDataNote: Transition tracking stays local-first and is never included in community aggregates, regardless of the toggle above.

report.title: PepiProgress Report
report.body: Export a PDF summary to share with a coach or doctor.
report.disclaimer: Self-reported data, not a medical record.

integrations.description: Connect a health source to auto-fill your log.
integrations.writeBackHint: Mirror your weight, body-fat estimate and waist to Health as you log them. Days recorded before now aren't sent.
integrations.empty: No data sources available on this device yet.
integrations.importSubtitle: Bring in past data to start with a richer baseline.

notify.description: Local reminders on this device. No account needed.
notify.webUnsupported: Reminders are available on the mobile app.
notify.checkinBody: Take a moment to log how today went.
notify.doseBody: Don't forget to log today's doses.
notify.inventoryBody_one: {{count}} item is low or expiring soon.
notify.inventoryBody_other: {{count}} items are low or expiring soon.
notify.photoBody: A new progress comparison is ready to capture.
notify.macroBody: How much protein and calories did you have today?
notify.typicalBodyNutrition: Do you eat about the same most days? One tap could fill in your nutrition.
notify.typicalBodySleep: Do you sleep about the same most nights? One tap could fill in your sleep.
notify.skippedBody: {{compound}}: the last {{count}} scheduled doses have no log. Ran out, side effects, or a planned break? Tell Pepi.
notify.morningBody: A quick read: how did you sleep?

cycle.description: Optional. Flags luteal-phase water retention on weight, measurements, and photos so the algorithm accounts for it.

measurements.optionalHint: Optional: log measurements to track body composition changes.
measurements.ffmiHedge: Estimated range from your body-fat band. Not a medical measurement.

bodyType.description: Optional. Helps the algorithm set the right baseline expectations for your body type.

auth.signUpSubtitle: Create a free account to back up your data and sync across devices.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to restore your data on this device.
auth.migratedBody: Your data has been saved to the cloud.
auth.restoredBody: Your data has been loaded onto this device.
auth.partialSync: {{count}} item(s) could not sync, your local data is safe.
auth.errorMissingFields: Please enter your email and password.

account.noAccountBody: Your data lives on this device only. Create a free account to back it up and access it anywhere.
account.signOutConfirmBody: Your data stays on this device. To remove it completely, delete the app.
account.signOutError: Could not sign out. Check your connection and try again.

lab.description: Import bloodwork results from a photo of your lab report.
lab.empty: Nothing recognized. Try a clearer, well-lit photo.
lab.permissionNeeded: Camera or photo library access is needed to import a lab result.
lab.vialUnreadable: Label is unclear. Try a closer, well-lit photo.
lab.pdfTooLarge: That PDF is too large. Try a photo of the report instead.

drive.description: Back up your data to your personal Google Drive. Private app storage, not visible in your Drive folder.
drive.restoreBody: Restore from backup made on {{date}}? Your current data will be merged.
drive.noBackups: No backups found in Google Drive.
drive.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
drive.notConfigured: Google credentials are not configured (EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID missing).
drive.webUnsupported: Drive backup is available on the mobile app.

insights.title: Ask your data
insights.description: AI analysis grounded in your own logged data. Never medical or dosing advice.
insights.askPlaceholder: e.g. how has my sleep trended since I started?
insights.notConfigured: AI insights aren't set up yet.
insights.error: Couldn't analyze right now. Try again.
insights.insufficient: Not enough logged data yet to find a pattern. Keep logging.
insights.disclaimer: Observational analysis of your own data, not medical advice.
insights.heading: Your data
insights.unlockBody: Insights find patterns across your logs: trends, correlations, and answers about your own data.
insights.projected: Dotted line: projected trend at your recent pace, shaded by uncertainty.
insights.projectedFlat: Dotted line: holding near your current weight at your recent pace.

compounds.noResults: No matches. Add it as a custom compound below.

dashboard.empty: Log a few days or add a photo to see your progress here.
dashboard.estimatedHint: Dashed line: estimated from your wearable data.
dashboard.estimatedModeHint: Estimates come from your heart rate, HRV, sleep and activity. They never replace what you log.
dashboard.dosesPlaceholder: Add a protocol to track daily doses
dashboard.distillError: Couldn’t reach the service. We’ll retry automatically.

addCompound.title: Add compound
addCompound.reconSuggestion: Add {{water}} mL BAC water for {{conc}} mg/mL
addCompound.logVial: I have this vial on hand
addCompound.reconHint: Enter a dose and vial size for a reconstitution suggestion.

compoundInfo.trackOnly: Track-only compound. Pepi records your doses and effects but does not surface ranges or protocol information for it.
compoundInfo.consultPointer: Check with your doctor or pharmacist about contraindications and interactions.
compoundInfo.disclaimer: Educational only, not medical advice and never a personal recommendation.

attribution.leadCompound: Best explained by the protocol; nothing else shifted much at the same time.
attribution.leadNutrition: Your nutrition shifted at the same time and likely explains most of this.
attribution.leadTraining: Your training shifted at the same time and likely explains most of this.
attribution.disclaimer: Association over time, not proof. Pepi cannot separate causes with certainty.

expectation.disclaimer: Commonly reported timelines, unverified. Everyone responds differently; yours is the curve that matters.

onset.label: Appetite settles
onset.desc: Reduced appetite and early fullness are commonly reported first.

early_loss.label: Early loss
early_loss.desc: The steepest scale movement is often reported in this window.

continued.label: Steady loss
continued.desc: Loss commonly continues at a slower, steadier pace.

plateau.label: Plateau
plateau.desc: Many report the rate flattening; adherence and intake matter most here.

onset.label: Onset
onset.desc: First changes in the target area are commonly reported early.

peak.label: Peak effect
peak.desc: The most noticeable recovery is often reported in this window.

taper.label: Maintained
taper.desc: Benefits commonly hold and taper as tissue settles.

settling.label: Settling in
settling.desc: Little visible change is commonly reported this early.

visible.label: Visible change
visible.desc: Skin tone and texture changes are most commonly reported here.

maintained.label: Maintained
maintained.desc: Changes commonly hold with continued use.

sleep_recovery.label: Sleep and recovery
sleep_recovery.desc: Deeper sleep and faster recovery are commonly reported first.

water.label: Water shift
water.desc: Some early water retention or fullness is commonly reported.

body_comp.label: Body composition
body_comp.desc: Slow body-composition changes are more commonly reported later.

plateau.label: Plateau
plateau.desc: Many report effects leveling off around here.

onset.label: Onset
onset.desc: Changes to sleep are commonly reported within the first nights.

settled.label: Settled
settled.desc: The effect commonly settles into a consistent pattern.

onset.label: Onset
onset.desc: Subtle shifts in focus or mood are commonly reported early.

settled.label: Settled
settled.desc: The effect commonly settles over the following weeks.

me.title: Me
me.name: Name
me.goalsHint: What you are tracking toward. This sets which fields your daily log surfaces.

ask.title: ASK PEPI
ask.notUnderstood: Not sure how to answer that yet. Try a suggestion.

verdict.baselineCta: Take your first photo to start your baseline

explanation.building: Still finding your baseline. A few more logs and the first real reading takes shape.
explanation.on_track: Your {{metric}} is moving the way your goal needs. Quietly, this is what progress looks like.
explanation.watch: Signals are mixed. A few more days will settle it.
explanation.off_track: Your {{metric}} is drifting from your goal.
explanation.plateau: Your weight is holding. Tape and photos carry the read now.
explanation.watchMixed: Signals are mixed: {{drag}} is pulling against an otherwise steady week.
explanation.watchMixed2: Signals are mixed: {{drag}} and {{drag2}} are pulling against the rest.

reconcile.trainingLoad: Your {{metric}} reflects recent training load, not a setback.
reconcile.cycle: Your {{metric}} tracks your cycle, not fat regain.
reconcile.compound: Your {{metric}} is an expected effect of your protocol.

confidenceWhy.medium: A few signals agree; others are mixed.

pepi.subtitle: Log anything, or ask about your data.
pepi.notUnderstood: I could not read that as a log or a question. Try rephrasing.
pepi.emptyHint: Tell Pepi what you did today, or ask about your own numbers.
pepi.photoNone: No progress photos yet. Take one from the Photos tab.
pepi.movedNone: Not enough logged yet to see what moves together.

turnedOff.morning: Turned off the morning check-in. You can turn it back on in Settings, Notifications.
turnedOff.evening: Turned off the evening check-in. You can turn it back on in Settings, Notifications.

ctl.turnedOffMacros: Turned off the end-of-day macro reminder. It lives in Settings, Notifications.
ctl.alreadyQuiet: Notifications are already at the minimum. Anything else lives in Settings, Notifications.

signal.noEvents: No logged events in this window yet

explain.weight: Your total body weight. It moves with fat, muscle, water, and food in your system, so daily swings are normal. The trend over weeks is what matters.
explain.body_fat_pct: An estimate of how much of your body is fat, from your measurements. It is the cleanest read of fat change, since weight alone mixes in water and muscle.
explain.waist: Waist circumference. For most people it is where fat is lost or gained first, so it often moves before the scale does.
explain.hips: Hip circumference. It reflects fat and muscle around the hips and glutes, and changes at a different pace than the waist.
explain.energy: Your subjective energy for the day. Sleep, training load, nutrition, and stress all push it up or down.
explain.sleep_quality: How rested you felt. Consistent sleep and timing raise it; late nights, alcohol, and stress lower it.
explain.soreness: Muscle soreness. Hard or new training raises it; rest days and lighter sessions bring it down.
explain.default: A tracked signal in your log. Its trend is read against your goal over the recent window.

whatILog.title: What I log
whatILog.hint: Add or remove fields from your daily check-in. Defaults follow your goals and compounds.

typical.chipHint: How did today compare to a normal day?
typical.settingsHint: Set a normal day once, then log with a tap. These values are treated as estimates.

ask.nutrition: Do you eat about the same most days?
ask.sleep: Do you sleep about the same most nights?

baselineAsk.nutrition: About how many calories and how much protein on a normal day? Rough is fine.
baselineAsk.sleep: About how many hours do you sleep on a normal night? Rough is fine.

typical.declineAck: No problem. You can set this up any time from Settings.
typical.confirmNutrition: Got it: about {{calories}} kcal and {{protein}} g protein on a normal day. I will treat days you check in as roughly this, marked as estimated, unless you tell me otherwise.
typical.confirmSleep: Got it: about {{hours}} hours on a normal night. I will treat days you check in as roughly this, marked as estimated, unless you tell me otherwise.

baselineRetry.nutrition: I did not catch both numbers. Try something like: 2600 cal, 150 g protein.
baselineRetry.sleep: I did not catch that. Try something like: 7.5 hours.

logged.more: Logged more than usual, marked as estimated.
logged.less: Logged less than usual, marked as estimated.

coaching.question: How much should Pepi weigh in?

hint.observe: Data in, hedged reads out. No unsolicited suggestions.
hint.nudge: Pepi speaks up when something looks off.
hint.coach: Targets, reasons, follow-ups. Lifestyle only, never dosing.

micro.snoozed: I'll ask again in an hour.

ask.sleep_short: Sleep came in well under your usual. Anything going on?
ask.sleep_poor: Sleep quality dipped against your usual. What happened?
ask.weight_jump: Weight moved more than usual overnight. Anything unusual yesterday? Big meal, travel, late salt?
ask.workout_drop: That session rated well under your usual. What got in the way?

anomaly.thanks: Noted. Days like this stay out of your baseline, so one odd day never skews your normal.
anomaly.muted: Understood, I will stop asking about that. Your data still logs as usual.

measureNext.title: Strengthen the read
measureNext.photoBaseline: A baseline photo would give the read something to compare against.
measureNext.photoDue_one: Your last photo was {{count}} week ago. A fresh one would sharpen the read.
measureNext.photoDue_other: Your last photo was {{count}} weeks ago. A fresh one would sharpen the read.

energyBalance.title: Energy balance
energyBalance.maintenance: Maintenance looks like about {{kcal}} kcal a day.
energyBalance.basis: Solved from your intake and weight trend over {{days}} days.
energyBalance.biasOver: Your tracker looks like it overreports burn by about {{pct}}%.
energyBalance.biasUnder: Your tracker looks like it underreports burn by about {{pct}}%.
energyBalance.disagreeSlower: The scale is moving slower than your logged intake implies. Common reasons: underlogged food or your body adapting.
energyBalance.disagreeFaster: The scale is moving faster than your logged intake implies. Often water, or intake logged a little low.
energyBalance.intakeLower: You've eaten less the last few days. The scale usually lags a change like this.
energyBalance.intakeHigher: You've eaten more the last few days. A short bump is usually water, not fat.
energyBalance.disclaimer: Estimated from your own data, not medical advice.

training.title: Training
training.deleteHint: Long-press an entry to remove it.

share.nothingYet: Log a few days first, then there will be something worth sharing.
share.failed: That did not go through. Try again.
share.settingsBody: Choose whether exported images carry the Pepi wordmark.

dose.amountInvalid: Enter a number greater than zero
dose.applyFutureBody: You logged {{dose}}{{unit}} instead of your usual {{previous}}{{unit}}.
dose.applyFutureNote: Doses you already logged stay exactly as they are.
